objectives.label: Place a House block in claimed territory
substeps: Claim the chunk around the room first.
Place the House block inside the room.
The block becomes the anchor for that home's validation.

objectives.label: Open the House status
substeps: Read the status line for missing roof, beds, enclosure, or appeal.
Fix the room and inspect again when the status changes.

objectives.label: Get a Home Marker Rod
substeps: Use the marker when a home needs an appeal region.
Bind it to the House block, then mark two corners around useful decoration.
Appeal improves citizen comfort once the home validates.

pages.text: A house is checked, not assumed
House blocks validate the space around them. Walls, roof, beds, and marked appeal regions decide whether citizens can live there happily.
Use Detect when a home shape is confusing. It helps turn a real built room into the home region the simulation understands.
